subject.description: Late-30s man, mixed ethnicity, slightly disheveled dark hair, wearing a faded navy crew-neck. Sitting at a cluttered desk, one hand hovering over the trackpad, the other braced on the desk edge. Skin pores visible, light stubble.
subject.action: Mid-gesture — arm half-raised, caught in the moment just before making a decision. Not posed. Not looking at camera.

setting.location: Home office or co-working space. Laptop open with a Meta Ads dashboard visible on screen — soft blue glow from the monitor. Background softly blurred: desk clutter, a coffee cup, cables. Real environment.
setting.time_of_day: Late afternoon — warm directional light coming from a window off to the left, slightly backlit.

composition.camera_angle: Slight low angle, eye-level to slightly below — looking up at him just barely
composition.framing: Small Medium shot. Top frame: crown with headspace. Bottom frame: below the nipples. Eyes land in upper third. Rule of thirds — subject offset slightly left, screen visible on right.

camera_settings.motion_blur: subtle — very slight on the raised hand to show mid-motion

lighting.type: Natural window light from left — warm afternoon sun. Monitor glow from the laptop adds a cool blue fill from the right. Practical dual-source lighting.
lighting.color_grading: Cinematic teal-orange — blue-pushed shadows, warm protected skin tones. Shadows cool, highlights amber.

mood: The split-second before committing — focused, slightly tense, mid-thought. Not stressed, not relaxed. Locked in.
aesthetic_style: 8K ultra realistic, hyper realistic photorealism. Shot on Sony A7 IV, 80mm f/2.8. Skin pores visible, individual stubble hairs sharp. Feels like a still from a prestige documentary series. NOT posed, NOT stock, NOT studio.
